title: No file_paths supplied → no region surface (HITL also empty)
note: Documents acknowledged behavior: when caller omits file_paths, region anchor is unreachable and only HITL/guided fire.

title: Empty file_paths but collision-pending exists → HITL fires globally
note: Validates FF4-adjacent contract: HITL is global and fires regardless of topic/file_paths.

title: Transitive miss — decision pinned to a dependency of file_paths
xfail: M6 — get_neighbors transitive expansion not wired in handle_preflight; mitigation queued in catalog implementation queue
note: Decision is pinned to auth/jwt.py which login_handler imports; today's handler only sees the direct file.

title: Dedup window swallows fresh signal after a relevant decision lands

region_decisions.description: Webhook events deduped via Redis SETNX

xfail: M7 — dedup key is (topic) only; second call hits recently_checked. Fix queued: broaden cache key to (topic, normalized_file_paths, ledger_revision).
note: Two-call: first call empty, ledger gains decision, second call within window currently silenced.

title: Dedup window swallows result when file_paths shifts to a different region
xfail: M7 — same dedup-key issue; file_paths must be part of the cache key.
note: Same topic, different file_paths — second call should re-evaluate but is silenced today.

title: Dedup window ignores HITL state changes within window
xfail: M7 — dedup ignores HITL revision. Fix queued: invalidate dedup on HITL state change.
note: First call surfaces HITL; HITL resolves; second call should re-evaluate (no signal → silent) but currently returns recently_checked.

title: guided_mode=true forces fired=true even with no actionable signal
note: Documents intentional v0.10.x behavior. Reads as false-fire to the developer but is by design.

title: HITL context-pending surfaces regardless of topic relevance
note: Validates HITL is intentional global signal — not gated by topic match.
